title: durio griffithii
intro: Durio griffithii, also known as the Borneo durian, is a species of tree in the family Malvaceae, native to the tropical forests of Borneo. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Durio griffithii can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations often involving the bark, leaves, or seeds of the tree.
